sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.80: Copy booking room lines and nightly rows during transfer so occupancy and room rate move too.
  • 1.8.8.79: Make booking transfer approval fully replace target booking header with source header data.
  • 1.8.8.78: Create a separate guest record per Booking.com ICS booking import.
  • 1.8.8.77: Restrict booking transfer matches to exact same dates and exact same rooms.
  • 1.8.8.76: Show small booking diff details in transfer approvals.
  • 1.8.8.75: Clarify booking transfer UI with newer/older labels and match reasons.
  • 1.8.8.74: Force a fresh updater bump for Booking Transfers improvements.
  • 1.8.8.73: Match booking transfer candidates by date + room conflict so approvals appear more often.
  • 1.8.8.72: Improve booking transfer matching with stronger score-based candidate detection.
  • 1.8.8.71: Add settings link to Booking Transfers page for easier access.
  • 1.8.8.70: Add booking transfer approvals to move guest and note data from older Booking.com rows into newer ICS rows.
